title: Item Name Changer
description: A completely client sided mod that allows players to change their item name even in servers without op
body:
# Item Name Changer (v1.2)

A lightweight Fabric mod that lets players rename and customize their items with **powerful commands AND a brand-new GUI editor** — no anvils or experience required!

---

## ✨ What’s New in v1.2

🔥 **Brand New GUI Editor**
![Gui Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3748a11d2e5afac29d8586a0a501d54d875477f8.png)
- Fully interactive item editor
- Edit item name and lore visually
- Built-in **color picker**
- Formatting buttons (**Bold, Italic, Underline, Strikethrough**)
- Live **preview system**
- Clean and intuitive layout

📝 **Lore Editing Support**
- Add, remove, and edit multiple lore lines
- Fully persistent like item names

🎨 **Better Customization**
- Separate color controls for name and lore
- Easier formatting without memorizing codes

---

## 🧠 Important Note

- If you're using **resource packs with custom item models (name-based CIT)**:
  👉 Use the command:  
  `/customname <name>`

- If you just want to:
  - Edit name  
  - Add lore  
  - Use colors & formatting easily  
  👉 Use the **GUI (`config keybind from controls, default:g)**

---

## 🔹 Features

- 🏷️ **Rename items** with custom names (supports formatting codes)
- 📝 **Full lore editor** (multi-line support)
- 🎨 **Color picker GUI** for easy styling
- 🖥️ **Modern GUI editor** (no commands needed)
- 🔄 **Persistent storage** - survives relog, server sync, GUI use
- 🌍 **World-specific data** - separate configs per world/server
- ⚡ **Auto-restore engine** - restores names/lore automatically
- 💻 **Client-side only** - works on any server
- 🪶 **Lightweight & optimized**

---

## 📋 Commands

### `/customname <name>`
Rename the held item  
- Example: `/customname My Cool Sword`
- Example: `/customname Golden Blade`
### `/customname restore`
Restores held item name from config
### `/customname restoreall`
Restores all item name from config

## 🖼️ Resource Pack Used in Gallery

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fantasy-3d-weapons-cit

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader  
2. Install Fabric API  
3. Download the mod JAR  
4. Place it in `.minecraft/mods`

---

## 🔧 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.x  
- Fabric Loader 0.17.2+  
- Fabric API  
- Java 21+  

---

## 🎮 Use Cases

Perfect for:

- ⚔️ Survival players (no anvil needed)
- 🏗️ Creative builders
- 🎮 Minigame servers (Bedwars, Skywars, etc.)
- 🎭 Roleplay servers
- 🎨 Custom resource pack users (CIT support)

---

## 🛠️ Technical Details

- Client-side only  
- Works on any server  
- No permissions required  
- Changes visible only to you  

## 📜 License

MIT License

---

## 📞 Support

Found a bug or have an idea?  
Open an issue on GitHub!

---

**Made with ❤️ for the Fabric community**
